svg.text: Planning questionnaire started — choose mode, autonomy, and models
User model exists with email + password_digest
↳ Models switch automatically on phase transitions
↳ Uses your actual modelRegistry — no hardcoded list
↳ Override per-phase at any time with M key
POST /auth/login returns JWT token on valid credentials
